page_content:
### **Email Template: Dr. Fateme Esmailie**
*(The Personable & Collaborative Professor)*  
Subject: A Quick Request for a Letter of Recommendation – [Your Name]  
Hi Dr. Esmailie,  
I hope you're having a wonderful week! I wanted to reach out again regarding my graduate school application in CS/AI and potential professional references (Technical Solutions Engineer). As we discussed before, I'm now looking to strengthen this part of my portfolio with your support.  
Your willingness to collaborate on the letter draft was so appreciated—especially when you shared about your cats and family! It made me feel like a real student in your class. Since then, I’ve completed [briefly mention key achievement: e.g., "a research project on AI-driven diagnostics" or "my capstone in machine learning"], which I believe would be valuable to include in the letter.  
Would you be open to reviewing a draft version that I’ll share with you? If so, please let me know what format works best for you (e.g., Word doc or Google Doc), and if there’s anything specific about my work you’d like me to highlight. I’m happy to adjust any details to make this as smooth as possible for your schedule.  
Looking forward to hearing from you!  
Best,
[Your Full Name]
[Student ID/Program, if applicable]
[Contact Information]  
---
